$comment: Hand-maintained old-WordPress redirects. gen-redirects.mjs writes public/.htaccess from this file PLUS an auto-generated block that 301s every un-prefixed French path to its /fr/ equivalent (the site moved from French-at-root to /fr/, /en/, /ar/). Targets here already point at /fr/ so no redirect chains form. A trailing '*' is a wildcard whose capture fills the target's '*'. AATUJA URLs are deliberately absent -- that content was deleted, so those paths return the 404 page.

redirects.why: internal slug of the old front page; / is now the language gate
the 10 official PDFs kept their filenames and their /documents/ path, so old direct links still resolve
